completed_this_session: Switched to and stayed on next-cc branch for full session.
Renamed README_md.md → README.md, do-snapshot_sh.sh → do-snapshot.sh, do-restore_sh.sh → do-restore.sh via git mv (history preserved).

Updated README.md: added setup step 4 (environment file), updated op run example to reference .env.example, expanded file structure tree to show full repo layout.
Set DOCTL_CONTEXT="default" in both script config blocks so scripts run against the existing doctl context without prompting.
Applied chmod +x to do-snapshot.sh and do-restore.sh.
Created docs/setup-cc.md: new-user setup guide documenting prerequisites, what was pre-configured, dry-run test commands, and dedicated context setup.
